name: @kontourai/flow-agents
description: Flow Agents keeps coding agents on track with evidence-backed workflows — a Kontour product that applies Flow and Veritas process discipline as a portable layer inside the agent tools you already use: Claude Code, Codex, Kiro, opencode, and pi — with framework adapters (AWS Strands preview) on the same policy-engine contract.

scripts.validate:source: npm run build --silent && node build/src/cli.js validate-source
scripts.context-map: npm run build --silent && node build/src/cli.js context-map
scripts.context-map:check: npm run build --silent && node build/src/cli.js context-map --check
scripts.capability-matrix: npm run build --silent && node build/src/cli.js capability-matrix
scripts.capability-matrix:check: npm run build --silent && node build/src/cli.js capability-matrix --check
scripts.build:bundles: npm run build --silent && node build/src/cli.js build-bundles
scripts.validate:package: npm run build --silent && node build/src/cli.js validate-package
scripts.effective-backlog-settings: npm run build --silent && node build/src/cli.js effective-backlog-settings
scripts.assignment-provider: npm run build --silent && node build/src/cli.js assignment-provider
scripts.effective-assignment-provider-settings: npm run build --silent && node build/src/cli.js effective-assignment-provider-settings
scripts.effective-change-provider-settings: npm run build --silent && node build/src/cli.js effective-change-provider-settings
scripts.pull-work-provider: npm run build --silent && node build/src/cli.js pull-work-provider
scripts.publish-change: npm run build --silent && node build/src/cli.js publish-change
scripts.promote-workflow-artifact: npm run build --silent && node build/src/cli.js promote-workflow-artifact
scripts.usage-feedback: npm run build --silent && node build/src/cli.js usage-feedback
scripts.runtime-adapter: npm run build --silent && node build/src/cli.js runtime-adapter
scripts.telemetry-doctor: npm run build --silent && node build/src/cli.js telemetry-doctor
scripts.validate:hook-influence: npm run build --silent && node build/src/cli.js validate-hook-influence
scripts.workflow-artifact-cleanup-audit: npm run build --silent && node build/src/cli.js workflow-artifact-cleanup-audit
scripts.fixture:retirement-audit: npm run build --silent && node build/src/cli.js fixture-retirement-audit
scripts.trust-reconcile-verify: npm run build && npm run eval:static
scripts.eval:llm:claude: bash evals/run.sh llm dev --runtime claude --judge-runtime codex
scripts.prepack: npm run build:bundles --silent && npm run validate:source --
scripts.kit: npm run build --silent && node build/src/cli.js kit
scripts.narrative-sources: npm run build --silent && node build/src/cli.js narrative-sources
